title: Ancient Animations
description: Brings back classic Minecraft 1.7 combat animations to modern versions.
body:
# Ancient Animations

Brings back classic Minecraft 1.7 combat animations to modern versions.

![8mb gif-nl1-g9vLhDbF-ezgif com-video-to-gif-converter (2)](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/dc4f6137-9ccb-4fa2-b417-2d035a4a4d88)

## Features

- **1.7 sword blocking:** right-click with any sword to block
- **1.7 swing animation:** recreation of the old sword swing arc
- **Eating & drinking animations:** punching while consuming food or potions
- **Bow draw animation:** punching while bow is drawn
- **Fully configurable:** swing and item transform configuration via in-game GUI

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Drop the mod `.jar` into your `mods` folder

## Configuration

Open the config screen via:
- **Options → Ancient Animations...**
- Keybind: **Right Shift** (rebindable in Controls)
- Command: `/aa` or `/ancientanimations`
